title: Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Ramanathapuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Ramanathapuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The sanctuary covers an area of 5.93 km2 (2.29 sq mi) and was notified in 1998.

topPlaces.name: Melasirupothu
topPlaces.description: Melasirupothu is a village in Ramanathapuram district and Mudukulathur Taluka in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is 16 km west of Mudukulathur, 8 km east of Sikkal and 15 km east of Ervadi.

topPlaces.name: Kadaladi taluk
topPlaces.description: Kadaladi taluk is a taluk of Ramanathapuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kadaladi.

topPlaces.name: Kadaladi
topPlaces.description: Kadaladi () is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 108 km from Madurai.

topPlaces.name: Gundar River
topPlaces.description: Gundar River flows through Madurai, Virudhunagar and Ramanathapuram districts of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The origin of Gundar is Sathuragiri hills, and it flows through Tirumangalam, Kamuthi and ends itself into Gulf of Mannar.

items.note: Melasirupothu is a village in Ramanathapuram district and Mudukulathur Taluka in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is 16 km west of Mudukulathur, 8 km east of Sikkal and 15 km east of Ervadi.
Kadaladi taluk is a taluk of Ramanathapuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kadaladi.
Kadaladi () is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 108 km from Madurai.

Gundar River flows through Madurai, Virudhunagar and Ramanathapuram districts of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The origin of Gundar is Sathuragiri hills, and it flows through Tirumangalam, Kamuthi and ends itself into Gulf of Mannar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (91 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Melaselvanur-Kilaselvanur Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Melasirupothu, Kadaladi taluk, Kadaladi, Gundar River.
